release_thresholds.count_scope: qualification requires at least 20000 demonstrated byte-deletion-primary-minimal rows; 308 authored/host coverage rows are additional and every classified row carries a complete normative failure triple

interpretation: PASS means every warranted, applicable comparison agreed. Common Lisp N/A rows and unexecuted host-property metadata are not counted as passes.
residual_boundaries: A1-A9 are closed by the pinned ruling and Errata 0.1; all 37 promoted cases are compared on their complete adjudicated expectations.
Unclassified mutations receive no expected triple; any disagreement requires minimization.
Seven host-property scenarios remain owned by Phase-4 qualification or instrumentation.
All fourteen generated resource-boundary descriptors remain metadata here; the promoted operation vectors and Phase-4 qualification execute adjudicated boundaries.
Three Common Lisp optional/language-specific importer rows remain N/A, not pass.
